calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Re Interpretation Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der (Counsel for Doris Kelly, Co-Trustee); Doris Kelly (Co-Trustee, present in court).

After brief discussion, the Court found the proposed interpretation of the Trust terms reasonable and granted the Petition instructing the Co-Trustees to distribute the Trust corpus directly to the beneficiaries of the Mary Fisher Trust (signing the Order for same in open court).

Judicial Office: Dorothy L. McMath, Commissioner; Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR #11722; Bailiff: Deputy Rigo Guitron; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: None.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
